task: Show me the comparison of the first two personal credit cards that do not charge foreign transaction fees.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to the American Express personal credit cards page, applied the 'No Foreign Transaction Fee' filter, selected the first two listed personal cards (American Express® Gold Card and The Platinum Card® from American Express), opened the comparison modal, and extracted comparison details visible on the site. The final response accurately summarizes supported details such as no foreign transaction fees for both, annual fees, welcome offers, APR, rewards type, and key benefits. Although one row in the summary ('Shared benefits shown' including The Hotel Collection for Platinum) is slightly imprecise relative to the modal, the core task—showing a comparison of the first two qualifying personal cards—was completed with the correct cards and largely accurate information backed by the page evidence.
final_result_response:
I filtered Amex personal cards by “No Foreign Transaction Fee” and compared the first two listed: **American Express® Gold Card** and **The Platinum Card® from American Express**.

| Feature | American Express® Gold Card | The Platinum Card® from American Express |
|---|---:|---:|
| Foreign transaction fees | None | None |
| Annual fee | $325 | $895 |
| Welcome offer | As high as **100,000 Membership Rewards® points** after spending $8,000 in first 6 months | As high as **175,000 Membership Rewards® points** after spending $12,000 in first 6 months |
| Pay Over Time APR | 19.49% to 28.49% variable APR | 19.49% to 28.49% variable APR |
| Rewards type | Membership Rewards® points | Membership Rewards® points |
| Key earn rates | 4X restaurants worldwide, 4X U.S. supermarkets, 5X prepaid hotel stays via Amex Travel, 3X flights, 2X prepaid car rentals/cruises via Amex Travel, 1X other purchases | 5X flights booked directly/Amex Travel up to $500K/year, 5X prepaid hotels via Amex Travel, 1X other purchases |
| Best fit | Dining, groceries, everyday/travel rewards | Premium travel perks, lounges, hotel and travel credits |
| Shared benefits shown | No foreign transaction fees, Global Assist Hotline, Pay with Points, Pay Over Time, Plan It, The Hotel Collection | Same |
| Notable Gold-focused perks | Dining Credit, Dunkin’ Credit, Resy Credit on Gold, Uber Cash on Gold, Hertz Five Star Status | Not shown |
| Notable Platinum-focused perks | Not shown | Airport lounge access, Airline Fee Credit, CLEAR Plus Credit, Global Entry/TSA PreCheck credit, Fine Hotels + Resorts, hotel credit, digital entertainment credit, Uber Cash/One credits, Walmart+ credit, Hilton/Marriott status |

Bottom line: **Gold** is more everyday-spend focused with a lower fee. **Platinum** costs much more but is built around premium travel benefits and lounge access.
action_history: Opening American Express: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.americanexpress.com/');
Opening personal credit cards page: await page.locator('e16').click();
Filtering no foreign transaction fee cards: await page.locator('e34').click();
